# The Winter GUI Pack: Java Edition
**Winter GUI** Pack refreshes Minecraft’s interface with a soft and atmospheric winter theme. Gentle snow accents, subtle icy highlights, and warm seasonal details bring a festive touch to menus and inventories without overwhelming the vanilla style.

[![img](https://i.imgur.com/iDtAFvQ.png)](https://www.reddit.com/user/No-Lavishness-4629/)

## This pack updates:
- Main menu
- Buttons and UI elements
- Inventory and container screens
- Hover and selection effects

Everything is designed to feel cozy, clean, and easy on the eyes-perfect for both single-player worlds and servers.

**Feel free to share feedback! Helpers are welcome too :)**
